title: Light Daylight Nebula Theme

included: frontend/src/styles/nav.css light-only visual overrides if needed
excluded: layout, spacing, sizing, route, prop, store, or persistence changes

assumptions: Layout must not change; only color, gradients, shadows, opacity, and existing pseudo-element visuals may change.
Theme storage remains light | dark | purple.
Daylight Nebula means pale readable surfaces with sky, cyan, violet, and pearl highlights.
risks: High-glow token choices can reduce contrast on light backgrounds.
tokens.css has broad reach across files, settings, auth, upload, preview, and dialogs.
Fluid sizing checks can fail if fixed visible dimensions are introduced.
